LanguageData.BowelLevel.stages.0.description: I need to go so bad I'm about to burst!
LanguageData.BowelLevel.stages.0.label: Bursting
LanguageData.BowelLevel.stages.1.description: I need to go to the bathroom.
LanguageData.BowelLevel.stages.1.label: need the bathroom
LanguageData.HygieneLevel.stages.0.description: I smell like i have been swimming in sewage.
LanguageData.HygieneLevel.stages.0.label: Filthy
LanguageData.HygieneLevel.stages.1.label: grimy
LanguageData.HygieneLevel.stages.2.label: Clean
LanguageData.HygieneLevel.stages.3.label: Squeaky Clean
